global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a central content area highlighting an exclusive offer.
global.main_message: Promoting an exclusive offer with a call to action.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background that fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: Content area
elements.description: A central content area featuring a light blue shape with rounded edges, suggesting a modern design.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: An overlay shape that is rectangular with rounded corners, positioned slightly off-center within the content area.

elements.label: Exclusive offer text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Exclusive tonight' with a smaller line below it saying 'Cancel anytime', conveying urgency.

elements.label: NeonCast logo
elements.description: The logo 'NeonCast' displayed in a prominent, bold font at the top of the ad, suggesting a tech-savvy brand.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Order now' in white, designed to stand out against the blue background.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge displaying '30%' in white text, indicating a discount, positioned at the bottom left.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label with the text 'UGC' in white, positioned at the top left, suggesting user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern and vibrant, exclusive offer, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Exclusive tonight, Cancel anytime, NeonCast, Order now, 30%, UGC
